'''ranongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackwhore|crackwhore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackwhore|crackwhore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ranongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænengeth|rænengeth]] || [[word:rænengej|rænengej]] || [[word:rænengesh|rænengesh]] || [[word:rænenge|rænenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranonongoth|ranonongoth]] || [[word:ranonongoj|ranonongoj]] || [[word:ranonongosh|ranonongosh]] || [[word:ranonongo|ranonongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranongoth|ranongoth]] || [[word:ranongoj|ranongoj]] || [[word:ranongosh|ranongosh]] || [[word:ranongo|ranongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranofngoth|ranofngoth]] || [[word:ranofngoj|ranofngoj]] || [[word:ranofngosh|ranofngosh]] || [[word:ranofngof|ranofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranongotho|ranongotho]] || [[word:ranongojo|ranongojo]] || [[word:ranongosho|ranongosho]] || [[word:ranongoko|ranongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranongoth|ranongoth]] || [[word:ranongoj|ranongoj]] || [[word:ranongosh|ranongosh]] || [[word:ranongo|ranongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranongothol|ranongothol]] || [[word:ranongojol|ranongojol]] || [[word:ranongoshol|ranongoshol]] || [[word:ranongokol|ranongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranongothotho|ranongothotho]] || [[word:ranongojojo|ranongojojo]] || [[word:ranongoshosho|ranongoshosho]] || [[word:ranongoko|ranongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranongothon|ranongothon]] || [[word:ranongojon|ranongojon]] || [[word:ranongoshon|ranongoshon]] || [[word:ranongokon|ranongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranongothoro|ranongothoro]] || [[word:ranongojoro|ranongojoro]] || [[word:ranongoshoro|ranongoshoro]] || [[word:ranongokoro|ranongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
